raw_text: {"verdict":"ESCALATE","rationale":"The callback verification failed the pre-change vendor-master source requirement. The pre-change snapshot (VM-SNAP-V-PHC-1194-20241112) listed phone +1-503-555-0117, but the callback (CALLSYS-883306) dialed +1-503-555-0174, which was sourced from the invoice remittance contact rather than the vendor-master record. Policy AP-POL-2024-017 explicitly requires the callback log trace the dialed number to the pre-change vendor-master record, not later request, invoice, or submitted-contact data. This represents a material BEC control failure where the callback target was derived from the same data stream (invoice/remittance) it was meant to verify.","cited_artifacts":["VM-SNAP-V-PHC-1194-20241112","CALLSYS-883306","AP-POL-2024-017","PORTAL-CHG-2M7R4","AP-SIGNOFF-PHC-6022"]}

parsed_json.rationale: The callback verification failed the pre-change vendor-master source requirement. The pre-change snapshot (VM-SNAP-V-PHC-1194-20241112) listed phone +1-503-555-0117, but the callback (CALLSYS-883306) dialed +1-503-555-0174, which was sourced from the invoice remittance contact rather than the vendor-master record. Policy AP-POL-2024-017 explicitly requires the callback log trace the dialed number to the pre-change vendor-master record, not later request, invoice, or submitted-contact data. This represents a material BEC control failure where the callback target was derived from the same data stream (invoice/remittance) it was meant to verify.
